assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (the first output, step 0), lines 38-47 contain a 'Deployment Context Lookup' section that explicitly extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table: '| rhtpa-backend | https://github.com/rhtpa/rhtpa-backend | /home/dev/repos/rhtpa-backend | **customer-shipped** |' followed by 'Deployment context for rhtpa-backend: **customer-shipped**'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1 — Data Extraction), lines 38-47 show the deployment context lookup: 'The affected component label pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server maps to the rhtpa-backend source repository. Looking up the deployment context from the Source Repositories table in Security Configuration' with the result 'Deployment context for rhtpa-backend: **customer-shipped**'. Line 47 records it as metadata: 'This deployment context will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate coordination guidance in the remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md, all four task descriptions contain a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection nested under '## Implementation Notes'. Task 1 (line 56), Task 2 (line 109), Preemptive Task 1 (line 184), and Preemptive Task 2 (line 242) all include the subsection with text: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: All four Coordination Guidance subsections in remediation.md contain the exact text: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' This explicitly mentions all required elements: coordinating with Product Security, CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.
